title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation based in Turkey. This role offers the opportunity to build and improve the core backend systems powering next-generation business process automation. The Software Engineer will work on distributed workflow technologies that support critical enterprise operations at global scale. You will contribute to event-driven architectures, API design, process orchestration, and high-performance backend solutions. The position combines backend engineering, distributed systems, data consistency, scalability, and product-focused development. You will collaborate with a remote-first team of experienced engineers while solving complex technical challenges with real-world impact. This opportunity is ideal for an ambitious backend engineer who enjoys ownership, continuous learning, and building reliable systems used by thousands of organizations. Accountabilities The Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation is responsible for designing, developing, and improving backend systems that enable reliable workflow execution and enterprise automation. This role requires strong engineering fundamentals, product thinking, and the ability to contribute to complex distributed systems in a collaborative environment. Build and evolve backend features within event-sourced workflow engines and APIs supporting enterprise process automation. Develop, test, and deliver high-quality software while contributing to technical designs and architecture decisions. Design and maintain clean, reliable APIs with strong attention to developer experience, scalability, and backward compatibility. Work on distributed systems challenges involving event sourcing, command/event architectures, CQRS patterns, concurrency, ordering, and system reliability. Improve application performance by identifying inefficient processing patterns and optimizing data access across different storage technologies. Build and enhance observability capabilities through logging, metrics, tracing, and monitoring practices. Contribute to innovative automation features, including capabilities that enable intelligent agents to interact with business processes. Maintain high engineering standards through code reviews, testing, documentation, and continuous improvement initiatives. Identify technical debt and proactively recommend solutions to improve system quality and maintainability. Participate in production support activities and on-call responsibilities as experience grows. Collaborate effectively within a distributed, asynchronous engineering environment. Requirements The ideal candidate has professional backend engineering experience and a strong interest in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and scalable software development. Success in this role requires technical curiosity, ownership, clear communication, and the ability to solve complex problems independently. 2+ years of professional backend engineering experience. Strong understanding of backend development principles and software engineering best practices. Experience or strong interest in event-driven systems and distributed architectures. Understanding of concepts such as consistency, ordering, failure handling, and event sourcing fundamentals. Good API design skills, including creating clean REST interfaces and maintaining backward compatibility. Product-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering meaningful user outcomes. Ability to independently manage priorities, drive projects forward, and communicate progress effectively in a remote environment. Strong written communication skills for asynchronous collaboration. High motivation to learn, grow, and take on challenging technical problems. Experience with workflow automation, process orchestration, BPMN, or similar technologies is considered an asset. Familiarity with Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, relational databases such as PostgreSQL, and query optimization is preferred. Knowledge of observability practices, including logging, metrics, and tracing, is a plus. Working knowledge of JVM technologies is an advantage. Benefits Competitive compensation package based on location, experience, and qualifications. Fully remote work environment with flexibility to work from anywhere in India. Home office budget and support for creating an effective remote workspace. Flexible time off policies to support personal wellbeing and work-life balance. Opportunities to participate in team events, global gatherings, and community activities. Comprehensive wellbeing support, including healthcare resources and mental health programs. Lifestyle benefits designed to support fitness, family needs, personal interests, and financial wellbeing. Retirement and insurance benefits where applicable. Annual learning and development budget for courses, certifications, books, and professional growth. Opportunity to work on impactful technology used by global organizations. High-autonomy environment with significant ownership and career growth opportunities. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Backend Developer
description: Mid-Level Yazılım Geliştirici (NestJS, TypeScript )📍 İstanbul / Başakşehir Pozisyon Hakkında: Hexagonal mimari, NestJS, TypeScript teknolojileriyle yazılım projelerimizi geliştiren bir ekibe katılacak, orta seviyede deneyime sahip bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. Ekibimizle birlikte bağımsız microservisler tasarlayıp geliştirecek ve mevcut projelerde aktif rol alacaksınız. Sorumluluklarınız: Hexagonal mimari prensiplerine uygun, ölçeklenebilir microservisler geliştirmek. NestJS ve TypeScript kullanarak yeni modüller geliştirmek ve mevcutları optimize etmek. gRPC tabanlı iletişim çözümleri geliştirmek ve uygulamak. Test odaklı geliştirme (TDD) süreçlerini takip etmek ve test yazmak. Teknik dökümantasyon hazırlamak ve kod kalite standartlarını sağlamak. Aranan Nitelikler: Bilgisayar mühendisliği veya ilgili bir alanda lisans derecesi. NestJS ile en az 2 yıllık deneyim. TypeScript konusunda bilgi ve deneyim. Hexagonal (veya benzer DDD) mimari prensiplerinde deneyim. gRPC tabanlı iletişim protokollerinde bilgi sahibi olmak. API geliştirme ve entegrasyonu konusunda deneyim. Git ve versiyon kontrol sistemlerinde tecrübe. Clean Code ve SOLID prensiplerine bağlılık. Takım çalışmasına yatkınlık ve problem çözme yeteneği. Tercih Sebebi Olacak Ekstra Yetenekler: Kubernetes, Docker gibi containerization teknolojilerine hakimiyet. Mikroservis mimarisi ve mesajlaşma sistemleri (RabbitMQ, Kafka vb.) deneyimi. Unit, integration ve end-to-end test yazma tecrübesi. CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi. Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz! İletişim : hr@mgssoftware.net Lokasyon : İkitelli OSB Mahallesi, YTÜ Teknopark, D:101, Başakşehir / İstanbul

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: About Us BGTS is a software and technology solutions company with over 1,800 professionals and 25+ years of experience. Through engineering expertise and industry insight, our international offices deliver tailored solutions, enabling clients worldwide to achieve their business goals with flexibility, speed, and impactful results. About the Role BGTS International is looking for a skilled and proactive Full Stack Developer to join our team. In this role, you will work closely with our Head of Software Engineering, enterprise architects, and global clients across various industries, as well as driving key internal AI projects. This is a hybrid role requiring 3 days a week in the office. Our office is located on the İTÜ Ayazağa Campus. Responsibilities Design and build multi-agent and agentic workflows using LangGraph or comparable orchestration frameworks (state machines, tool use, memory, retries, and human-in-the-loop approval gates). Develop robust production backend services in Python and/or Java, ensuring clean API design, sound data modeling, and comprehensive test coverage. Build intuitive front-end interfaces (React or similar) that clearly expose agent behavior, including execution traces, intermediate steps, confidence levels, and points of human intervention. Implement and optimize advanced retrieval pipelines (chunking, embeddings, vector stores, hybrid search) and actively evaluate what improves actual answer quality. Instrument everything. Set up evaluation harnesses, tracing, cost/latency monitoring, and regression testing for both prompts and agentic graphs. Deploy and operate these systems on cloud infrastructure using containers and modern CI/CD pipelines. Requirements 5+ years of building production-grade software in Python and/or Java Demonstrable experience with agentic frameworks—such as LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI/Anthropic SDKs, or MCP—including systems that successfully made it past the prototype stage into production. Solid command over REST and event-driven APIs, relational and vector databases, and at least one modern JavaScript framework (preferably React). A deep understanding of GenAI failure modes (hallucination, prompt injection, tool misuse, runaway cost, non-determinism) and the engineering patterns used to mitigate them. Comfort with Docker, Git, CI/CD pipelines, and at least one major cloud provider (AWS, Azure, or GCP). Clear and effective communication skills in English (both written and spoken) for direct client collaboration. Nice to Have Experience in financial services or other highly regulated domains. Hands-on experience with model evaluation and observability tools (LangSmith, Langfuse, Weights & Biases, etc.). Background in Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), or general platform engineering.

title: Lead Full Stack Engineer (Fintech)
description: Fintech alanında faaliyet gösteren iş ortağımız için; Java 17+, Spring Boot ve Spring Framework ekosisteminde uzmanlaşmış, aynı zamanda React ile modern frontend geliştirme deneyimine sahip Lead Full Stack Engineer arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun En az 10 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Java (17+) ve Spring Boot/Spring Framework ekosisteminde ileri seviye bilgi React ile modern frontend geliştirme deneyimi (component-based mimari, state management) Git (GitFlow, trunk-based) ve code review süreçlerine hakim DDD / EDD yaklaşımları ile mikroservis geliştirme deneyimi SOLID prensipleri ve design pattern bilgisi Docker & Kubernetes deneyimi Apache Kafka, Redis ve Keycloak ile çalışma deneyimi Veritabanı tasarımı ve performans optimizasyonu konusunda yetkinlik Fintech domain bilgisi PayFac süreçleri (merchant onboarding, reconciliation, settlement, payout) hakkında deneyim Sanal POS, 3D / non-3D ödeme sistemleri bilgisi Banka, acquirer ve APM entegrasyon deneyimi Cross-border payment ve multi-currency sistem tecrübesi PCI DSS süreçlerinde deneyim Payment gateway, orchestration ve multi-acquirer routing bilgisi High throughput & low latency sistem geliştirme deneyimi Retry management ve circuit breaker pattern bilgisi Sorumluluklar: Backend ve frontend katmanlarında uçtan uca geliştirme yapmak Ölçeklenebilir ve yüksek performanslı mikroservis mimarileri tasarlamak Modern ve kullanıcı dostu arayüzler geliştirmek Kod kalitesi, performans ve güvenlik standartlarını uygulamak Sistem mimarisi kararlarında aktif rol almak ve teknik yönlendirme sağlamak Takım içinde best practice’leri yaygınlaştırmak Mevcut sistemlerde iyileştirme ve refactoring süreçlerine liderlik etmek High-level system design, scalability ve resiliency konularında mentorluk sağlamak “AVD Danışmanlık, Türkiye İş Kurumu’nun 1225 numaralı izin belgesi ile faaliyet göstermektedir.”

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description: Kurumsal bir iş ortağımızda danışman olarak konumlandırmak üzere "Senior Full Stack Engineer" arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Lokasyon: İstanbul/Kağıthane Çalışma Şekli: Haftada 4 gün ofis, 1 gün uzaktan Gereksinimler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun, .Net (C#) teknolojileri ile en az 5 yıl backend geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Mikroservis mimarisi, servis ayrıştırma, API Gateway yapıları ve distributed sistemler konusunda bilgi ve deneyim sahibi, RESTful API geliştirme ve farklı sistemlerle entegrasyon projelerinde aktif rol almış, SQL Server konusunda ileri seviyede bilgi sahibi; complex query, stored procedure geliştirme, performans optimizasyonu ve execution plan analizi konularında deneyimli, Entity Framework ve Dapper teknolojilerini etkin şekilde kullanan, React ile en az 3 yıl aktif frontend geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Git versiyon kontrol sistemlerini etkin kullanan, Agile/Scrum geliştirme süreçlerinde çalışma deneyimi bulunan, Azure servisleri , RabbitMQ, Redis ve MongoDB teknolojileri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Takım çalışmasına yatkın, iletişim becerileri kuvvetli ve sorumluluk bilinci yüksek. Sorumluluklar .Net ve React teknolojileri kullanarak ölçeklenebilir ve sürdürülebilir uygulamalar geliştirmek, Mikroservis tabanlı mimarilerin geliştirilmesi ve mevcut yapıların iyileştirilmesine katkı sağlamak, RESTful API'ler geliştirmek ve farklı sistemlerle entegrasyon süreçlerini yürütmek, Veritabanı tasarımı, performans optimizasyonu ve sorgu iyileştirme çalışmalarını gerçekleştirmek, Frontend ve backend ekipleriyle koordineli çalışarak uçtan uca geliştirme süreçelrine katkı sağlamak, Kod kalitesi, güvenlik ve performans standartlarına uygun yazılım geliştirmek.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Position Overview We're looking for a Mobile Developer to join our growing product team. In this role, you'll build and ship both the iOS and Android versions of our product. You'll be involved throughout the entire process — from idea to release — and become part of a team that builds high-performance, user-friendly, and maintainable mobile apps. Responsibilities Develop and ship iOS (SwiftUI) and Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) applications Build and maintain integrations with backend REST APIs Continuously improve app performance, security, and stability Collaborate with the product and design teams to plan and deliver new features Manage App Store and Google Play release and update processes Contribute to code reviews with a focus on code quality Requirements Strong experience in at least one of iOS (Swift / SwiftUI) or Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose), with willingness to learn the other Solid understanding of REST API integration and mobile architecture Comfortable with Git version control and team collaboration Problem-solving mindset, eager to learn, and attentive to detail Good written and verbal communication skills Nice to Have Experience with both iOS and Android development Knowledge of mobile security, biometric authentication, or certificate pinning Experience with CI/CD and mobile test automation

title: Backend Engineer
description: Heltia nedir? Türkiye'nin en hızlı büyüyen dijital sağlık platformlarından biriyiz. 150'den fazla kurumsal müşteriye, 400.000'in üzerinde çalışana hizmet veriyoruz. Northzone liderliğinde ciddi yatırımlar aldık ve büyümeye devam ediyoruz. Ne üzerinde çalışacaksın? C#/.NET 8, MongoDB ve PostgreSQL kullanan çok API'li bir monorepo'da geliştirme yapacaksın Eşleştirme motoru, randevu/takvim, ödeme, sigorta entegrasyonları gibi iş kritik modüllerde çalışacaksın Hangfire ile arka plan iş kuyrukları yazacak ve yöneteceksin AI/LLM destekli ürün alanlarında backend entegrasyonları geliştireceksin Feature flag sistemi üzerinden kademeli rollout ve A/B test altyapısına dokunacaksın Docker + Kubernetes üzerinde çalışan servislerin CI/CD pipeline'ına katkı vereceksin Grafana/Loki/Tempo ile üretimdeki sorunları takip edip çözeceksin Nasıl çalışıyoruz? Domain bazlı sahiplenme ile çalışıyoruz — her ekip kendi backlog'unu yönetiyor, uçtan uca sorumluluk alıyor. PR'lar unit test ve code review geçmeden merge edilmiyor. Küçük bir ekibiz, kararlarının gerçek etkisini görürsün. Sende ne arıyoruz? C#/.NET ile production seviyesinde backend deneyimi (3+ yıl tercih edilir) MongoDB ve PostgreSQL/SQL Server deneyimi REST API tasarımı, repository/service katmanlı mimari ve iş kuyruğu (Hangfire veya benzeri) deneyimi Unit/integration test yazma alışkanlığı — bizde bu opsiyonel değil Docker ve temel Kubernetes bilgisi, CI/CD pipeline deneyimi Bağımsız çalışabilme ve sahiplenme — sürekli yönlendirilmeyi beklemeden ilerleyebilme İlgini çektiyse başvurularını bekliyoruz -> https://heltia-jobs.lovable.app/apply/559eb74d-9b17-4bc2-9aa7-5bcb69ad0c49
